core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix disparate disciplines.
Emotion First: Design maps to feeling.
Zoom In: Bold focus on details.
Contrast: Light vs Dark, Big vs Small.

headings.usage: All H1-H3, Hero text, Key Metrics

data.usage: Numbers, IDs, Code snippets, Status badges

cards.style: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow (or very subtle hover shadow).

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF6A00] text-white hover:bg-[#E65D00] rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium tracking-wide shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-300 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-md px-4 py-2

badges.style: Outline style with subtle background tint. Monospace font.
badges.classes: text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider font-mono px-2 py-0.5 rounded-sm border

visual_enhancers.noise_overlay: Add a subtle noise texture to the page background if possible for 'paper' feel.
visual_enhancers.trinity_icons: Use Lucide icons (Stroke width 1.5px) for crispness.

instructions_to_main_agent: Refactor '/app/frontend/src/pages/AdvisorWatchtower.js' to use the new design system.
Remove all inline styles that force dark mode colors (e.g., background: '#0F1720'). Use Tailwind classes.
Ensure 'Cormorant Garamond' is applied to the Greeting and Section Headings.
Implement the 'Bento Grid' layout for the main dashboard area.
Preserve all data fetching logic (useSnapshotProgress, useIntegrationStatus).
Simplify the 'Cognition Tabs' into a clean, horizontal list that controls the view below.
Make 'Risk Suggestions' more prominent/integrated, not just a list at the bottom.
Ensure the 'Daily Brief' feels like a narrative/story (Typography focus).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast ratio of 4.5:1 minimum.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements.
accessibility.aria_labels: Ensure all icon-only buttons have aria-labels.
